sentences: The commander ordered the tank to advance across the muddy terrain toward the enemy position.
An enemy rocket struck the side armor of the tank but failed to penetrate the hull.
Three soldiers crouched behind the disabled tank using its massive chassis as cover from incoming rounds.
The driver steered the tank through a narrow gap between two collapsed buildings without scraping the walls.
Engineers worked through the night to repair the damaged turret ring on the disabled tank.
Infantry soldiers used the tank as a mobile shield while they crossed the open ground.
Mechanics loaded spare parts onto a flatbed truck destined for the damaged tank at the forward base.
The scout spotted an enemy tank concealed beneath camouflage netting at the edge of the forest.
Rust covered the hull of the abandoned tank that had sat in the desert for decades.
The lieutenant climbed out of the tank and surveyed the landscape through a pair of field glasses.
A heavy transport aircraft carried the tank across the ocean to the staging area overseas.
Camouflage paint in a desert pattern covered every surface of the tank to reduce its visibility.
Battle scars and dents across the front plate of the tank told the story of many engagements.
A recovery vehicle towed the immobilized tank back to the repair depot behind the front lines.
The children at the air show climbed onto the parked tank and pretended to be soldiers.
Sandbags and razor wire surrounded the tank that served as a checkpoint along the main road.
The veteran described the deafening noise inside the tank during a live-fire engagement.
Composite armor arrays on modern main battle platforms give the tank superior protection against shaped charges.
Reactive armor tiles mounted on the tank hull detonate outward to neutralize incoming anti-armor projectiles.
A gas turbine engine powers the tank and provides a top speed of roughly forty-five miles per hour.
The fire control system allows the tank to engage targets accurately while moving at full speed.
Thermal imaging sights on the tank enable the crew to identify targets through smoke and darkness.
An auxiliary power unit allows the tank to operate its electronics without running the main engine.
Active protection systems intercept incoming projectiles milliseconds before they reach the tank hull.
The depleted uranium armor package on the latest variant gives the tank unmatched frontal protection.
A laser rangefinder integrated with the ballistic computer ensures the tank achieves first-round hit probability above ninety percent.
Suspension upgrades allow the tank to traverse rough terrain at higher speeds without excessive crew fatigue.
Battlefield data links allow the tank to share targeting information in real time with other armored units.
Somebody posted a video of a tank getting stuck in a ditch and needing another one to pull it out.
The photographer captured a striking image of a lone tank silhouetted against the orange desert sunset.
An improvised explosive device detonated beneath the lead tank but the reinforced hull absorbed most of the blast.
Dust clouds trailed behind the tank as it barreled across the open steppe at full throttle.
Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment.
Multi-spectral camouflage netting reduces the visual and thermal signature of the tank during static defense operations.
The hydraulic turret drive enables the tank to slew its main gun three hundred sixty degrees in under nine seconds.
During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive.
The platoon leader directed the tank into a concealed position behind the stone wall overlooking the crossroads.
He sketched the outline of the destroyed tank in his field journal while waiting for the convoy.
I built a scale model tank over the weekend and it turned out way better than I expected.
A crater in the road forced the tank to detour through the adjacent wheat field toward the bridge.
The war correspondent rode on top of the tank as it rolled into the newly liberated city.
Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen.
My cousin showed me around the military base and we got to sit inside a real tank.
Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats.
He painted a small flag on the side of the model tank and placed it on the display shelf.
The reconnaissance drone transmitted live footage of the enemy tank position to the brigade command post.
Drone footage showed the enemy tank reversing into a building for concealment as the strike aircraft approached.
The logistics officer calculated how many rail cars would be needed to transport every tank in the brigade.
A direct hit from the anti-armor round disabled the tank and forced the crew to evacuate on foot.
Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation.
The kids at the history fair built an impressive cardboard replica of a famous World War Two tank.
